title: Project Procurement
description: Turn a design's bill of materials into a buying list and supplier RFQs.

steps.title: Procurement list
steps.description: Every material the design needs to be built.
steps.voiceScript: This is the procurement list: every material the design needs.
steps.captionText: This is the procurement list: every material the design needs.
steps.fallbackMessage: Procurement list: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Add to RFQ
steps.description: Send items to suppliers to price.
steps.voiceScript: Add items to an RFQ to send them to suppliers for pricing.
steps.captionText: Add items to an RFQ to send them to suppliers for pricing.
steps.fallbackMessage: Add to RFQ: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Track the buy
steps.description: Follow items from quote to order.
steps.voiceScript: Track each item from quote through to order.
steps.captionText: Track each item from quote through to order.
